content.summary: The USA is the world's largest consumer market with strong contract enforcement. GSP (Generalized System of Preferences) may apply for Indonesian exports. FDA approval required for food/health products.
content.paymentPreference: L/C for first shipments; open account for established buyers
bestPractices: FDA registration mandatory for food, cosmetics, and devices
USDA organic certification increases price premium
Anti-dumping duties may apply on certain commodities
Strict labeling requirements (English, nutrition facts, allergen info)
